verbatim_text: You know, just hands off that one, right? Otherwise, I'd never talk to you again. His name is YouSoon. I was like, you know, I wouldn't know him. I only teach graduate. Anyway, well, a few days later, you actually come to my office hours. I'm like, oh, you're the kid who knows everything, right? You're a PhD student. I want to record you. He's like, no, actually, I'm a freshman. And so I was like, wait, do you take my West class? Are you working with Jeremy?
